{{ next.title }}
 {%- endif %} {% if prev -%}
{{ _("Previous") }}
{% if prev.link == pathto(master_doc) %}
{{ _("Home") }}
{% else %}
{{ prev.title }}
{% endif %}
{%- endif %}
{%- if show_copyright %}
{%- if hasdoc('copyright') %} {% trans path=pathto('copyright'), copyright=copyright|e -%} Copyright © {{ copyright }} | Qluster | Zepworks Blog {%- endtrans %} {%- else %} {% trans copyright=copyright|e -%} Copyright © {{ copyright }} | Qluster | Zepworks Blog {%- endtrans %} {%- endif %}
{%- endif %}

{% for icon_dict in theme_footer_icons -%} {{- icon_dict.html -}} {% endfor %}
{%- endif %}
{% endblock %}
